headline.vsl_adaptation: My name is Dr. Ross Stewart and I'm a Licensed Marriage and Family Therapist. About ten years ago, I spent the equivalent of $65,000 to attend a workshop run by doctors in Northern California. What they taught me changed everything I thought I knew about human sexuality...

lead.opening_verbatim: My name is Dr. Ross Stewart and I am a Licensed Marriage and Family Therapist. My practice is located in Dallas, Texas and my state certification number is 00469. I have degrees from two different colleges and, I have devoted my entire working life to helping people with all kinds of emotional problems. Because of this, the last thing in the world I want to do is offend anybody... or... make anybody emotionally uncomfortable. I'm telling you this because... The Rest Of This Message Is All About Sex!
lead.hook_mechanism: Credentials establishment + subject warning creates intrigue
lead.transition_to_body: If the subject of sex embarrasses you... or... if your religion teaches you sex is bad... or... if the idea of having extremely good sex offends you... please... stop reading right now.

mechanism.mechanism_description: Technical sexual skills taught by doctors in underground workshops, refined over 10 years of research. Unlike porn or communication advice, these are actual techniques for sustained maximum pleasure. Skills most people never learn past age 19 can be mastered at any age.

proof_elements.verbatim: Licensed Marriage and Family Therapist... state certification number is 00469
spent the equivalent in today's money of about $65,000 to go to a workshop
less than 1 out of 10,000 people know about this

key_sections.content_verbatim: Nearly every 'sex information' product I've seen on the market is nothing more than... A Silly Attempt To Pass Off Bad Pornography As Real Sexual Technique! Most of the so-called 'experts' you see and hear on television... do not know anything... about giving sustained, maximum pleasure by using truly superior sexual techniques.

About ten years ago, I spent the equivalent in today's money of about $65,000 to go to a workshop in Northern California which was run by other doctors. This workshop was on how to increase the frequency and quality of human orgasms. In short, it was all about how to have unbelievably good sex.
Using their techniques, a woman can have a continual orgasm that lasts more than an hour... and... a man's can last as long as 15-minutes. I went home stunned.

I've used all my spare time over the last decade to improve and refine those already spectacular techniques I had learned at the workshop. After all this research, I now know things about sex I'd never even guessed about.

bullet_point_teasers: How to 'set up' the perfect sexual encounter with your lover... every time!
The Number One Rule that absolutely must be observed for women to have a truly spectacular orgasm!
The '20-minute secret' that can turn your sex life around immediately
The single biggest sexual complaint women have about men!
Very specific secrets a lover can use to give their partner the best sex of their lives!
key_statistics: Less than 1 out of 10,000 people know about these secrets
99.9% of all people stop learning about their own sexuality at about 19 years of age
We are almost 12 times more sexual than the nearest mammal

extraction_notes.quality_assessment: Classic Gary Halbert long-form direct response with professional credentials lead
notable_elements: $65,000 workshop investment is powerful 'I paid so you don't have to' proof
'Stop reading now' warning actually increases readership
99.9% stuck at teenage skill level is powerful insight
extraction_notes.key_insight: The credentials-first approach combined with 'if this offends you stop reading' creates a paradox - it simultaneously legitimizes the offer while increasing curiosity through forbidden fruit psychology
